description:
In this step, you will enroll students into a specific program (class) for a given academic year.

Program Enrollment connects students with:
- Their assigned program (class)
- Academic year and term
- Courses associated with that program

This enrollment is a critical step that enables academic operations such as attendance tracking, assessments, timetable allocation, and report generation.

While enrolling a student:
- Select the student record
- Assign the appropriate program
- Specify the academic year
- Optionally assign the student to a specific section (student group)

Without enrollment, students will not be included in academic workflows such as exams, attendance, or timetable scheduling.
name: Enroll Students
title: Program Enrollment
